comment.body:
Hallo,
I will answer the questions about basic sizings, but first I recommend to read this post on X: https://x.com/alma18499/status/1865396323828297984

I will write a short educational post, a bit more detailed than this twitter post, soon. 
But be familiar with those that I already dropped in the educational channel and OD chat... bcs volatility posts and greek posts are about to come, then stochvol, stat arb, log opt portfolio, etc. 
everything that can help you to be a better trader.

You have to understand Kelly, to understand the power of sizing. that principle will be the base. 
If you want posts like "if 6040 then 6045, if 6045 then 6050 if not 6050 then maybe 6045 or stay at 6050", you are in the wrong service ;))
I can explain you my bias, I can teach you how to read the tape as I do, but you have to do your "homework", as written in the welcome email.

My recent educational posts are only the first introduction chapter of the book ;)) 
Money is a number, price action is number. Numbers are determined and expressed by numbers. get familiar with numbers and strategical approach
